name: tinyspline
description: Small ANSI C library for NURBS, B-splines, and Bezier curves. Vendored C-only sources from https://github.com/msteinbeck/tinyspline (tinyspline + parson.c for serialization). The upstream tinysplinecxx.cxx C++ wrapper is intentionally omitted because it requires exceptions, which are disabled in staging/production builds.
